FEI Ride Originals
programme.desc: The authors show the fascinating bond between people and horses.Traveling around the world, they present their point of view on horse riding and the community that builds it.They will also hold meetings with top players.

Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - Samsunspor
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Raków Częstochowa - CS Universitatea Craiova
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Shakhtar Donetsk - Legia Warszawa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: RC Strasbourg - Jagiellonia Białystok
UEFA Conference League Magazine
UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Lech Poznań - FC Salzburg 30.09.2010 - sezon 2010/2011
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Legia Warszawa - Rapid Bukareszt 03.11.2011 - sezon 2011/2012
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lincoln Red Imps FC - Lech Poznań
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: SK Sigma Olomouc - Raków Częstochowa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: NK Celje - Legia Warszawa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AC Sparta Prague - Raków Częstochowa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Rayo Vallecano - Lech Poznań
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

programme.title: UEFA Conference League Magazine
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lech Poznań - FC Lausanne-Sport
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Raków Częstochowa - SK Rapid Wien
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles 1st round match
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - AC Sparta Prague
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Jagiellonia Białystok - KuPS Kuopio
programme.desc: At the halfway point of the regular phase of the Conference League, Pride of Podlasie is in thirteenth place, which guarantees seeding in the play-off phase.Adrian Siemieniec's players remain undefeated, but they cannot be proud of their last performance.They only drew 1-1 with Macedonian Shkendija and scored the equalizing goal in the tenth minute of added time.Jagiellonia has a match against KuPS Kuopio, which, like itself, has five points.The Finnish team will take the field in Białystok encouraged by their 3-1 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the previous round.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: RC Strasbourg - Crystal Palace FC
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: FC Noah - Legia Warszawa
Football: UEFA Conference League - second leg play-off match: ACF Fiorentina - Jagiellonia Białystok
Football: UEFA Conference League - second leg play-off match: Lech Poznań - KuPS Kuopio

UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Odense - Wisła Kraków 01.12.2011 - sezon 2011/2012
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.sub-title: Lech Poznań - Juventus Turyn 01.12.2010 - sezon 2010/2011
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

Cafe Futbol
programme.desc: Polsat Sport journalists talk to their guests about football-related topics.The program will include, among others:interviews with football stars, polls and a review of recent events.

programme.title: Polsat Sport Talk Extra
programme.sub-title: Tomasz Frankowski
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

programme.title: Football: Dutch League - match: Heracles Almelo - PSV Eindhoven
Football: Saudi League - match: Al-Fayha FC - Al-Nassr FC
Football: Dutch league - match: FC Twente - Feyenoord Rotterdam
Football: Italian league - match: AS Roma - Juventus FC
Football: Dutch league - match: PEC Zwolle - AFC Ajax Amsterdam
Football: German League - match: VfB Stuttgart - VfL Wolfsburg
Football: Czech league - match: FK Dukla Prague - SK Slavia Prague
Football: Dutch League - match: Heracles Almelo - PSV Eindhoven
Football: Italian league - match: Inter Milan - Genoa CFC
Football: German League - match: Borussia Dortmund - FC Bayern Munich
programme.desc: By losing to Augsburg (1-2) and drawing with HSV (2-2), Bayern made the race for the German championship unexpectedly heat up.Borussia Dortmund took advantage of the Munich leader's shortness of breath and came within six points of him at the end of January.There is a chance that the clash between BVB and Die Roten in the 24th round of the Bundesliga will be the turning point of the current season.However, Nik Kovač's players will face an extremely difficult task.Borussia's last league triumph over Bayern at Signal Iduna Park took place in 2018.

programme.title: Football: Dutch league - match: PEC Zwolle - AFC Ajax Amsterdam
Football: Scottish League - match: Aberdeen FC - Celtic FC

programme.desc: The authors show the fascinating bond between people and horses.Traveling around the world, they present their point of view on horse riding and the community that builds it.They will also hold meetings with top players.

programme.desc: Polish jumpers went to the Olympics without any hope of success.Kacper Tomasiak, however, surprised the fans and the president of the Polish Football Association, Adam Małysz, by winning a total of three medals.

From the ESPN archives
programme.sub-title: Gala w Nowym Jorku: Floyd Patterson - George Chuvalo 01.02.1965
programme.desc: A reminder of the fights that aroused exceptional emotions in the boxing world.Viewers will once again see the clashes of the biggest stars of Polish and foreign boxing.

programme.title: Combat sports: UFC 317 - fight: Ilia Topuria - Charles Oliveira 29/06/2025
programme.desc: The most important event of the gala at the T-Mobile Arena in Paradise will be the fight for the lightweight championship belt, which Islam Makachev recently renounced.Former champion of this division Charles Oliveira and Ilia Topuria want to take over the title.For the German, the featherweight champion, it will be his debut in a higher category.Alexandre Pantoja will defend his flyweight title for the fourth time.Kai Kara-France will challenge the Brazilian.The confrontation between Mateusz Gamrot's club friend, Renato Moicano, and the Pole's former rival, Beneil Dariush, also promises to be interesting.

programme.title: Combat sports: UFC 317 - fight: Ilia Topuria - Charles Oliveira 29/06/2025
programme.desc: The most important event of the gala at the T-Mobile Arena in Paradise will be the fight for the lightweight championship belt, which Islam Makachev recently renounced.Former champion of this division Charles Oliveira and Ilia Topuria want to take over the title.For the German, the featherweight champion, it will be his debut in a higher category.Alexandre Pantoja will defend his flyweight title for the fourth time.Kai Kara-France will challenge the Brazilian.The confrontation between Mateusz Gamrot's club friend, Renato Moicano, and the Pole's former rival, Beneil Dariush, also promises to be interesting.

programme.sub-title: Gala w Glens Falls - waga ciężka: Mike Tyson - James Tillis 03.05.1986
programme.desc: A reminder of the fights that aroused exceptional emotions in the boxing world.Viewers will once again see the clashes of the biggest stars of Polish and foreign boxing.

programme.title: Combat sports: Babilon MMA 34 in Żyrardów - fight: Piotr Kacprzak - Krzysztof Mendlewski 27/01/2023
